package.name: mirte_driving
package.description: Team Member C — navigation/mapping/shuttle ONLY. SLAM (slam_toolbox) + Nav2 A↔B marker shuttle: zone_detector finds tag A (id 100) and the Zone B pair midpoint (ids 101/102); shuttle_manager drives the legs (A at ~1 m + camera fine-alignment, B at ~0.3 m) and exposes the merge hooks for the A-grasp (mirte_perception, laptop) and B-placement (mirte_placement) stages.
